title: August 2015 Meetup
description: PLEASE pre-register with security for access to the venue: https://generalassemb.ly/education/sf-hadoop-users-meetup/san-francisco/15046 Here is the lineup for our August 5th SFHUG meeting! We will have one opening presentation and then some community-proposed breakouts. Thank you to the Thomson Reuters team for hosting our food & drinks. http://photos2.meetupstatic.com/photos/event/a/c/c/5/600_439784229.jpeg
